\tzpentry{ID4412}{Quantum Quantum State Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4412 introduces Quantum Quantum State Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} i\hbar \partial_t \Psi = \Htrawin[\Psi,t], \end{equation}
